calendar.matters:
COMPLIANCE HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ALEX KATOFSKY, Esq. of Gaines & Gaines, APLC (tel: 818-703-8985) for Plaintiff.
Atty. AARON SILVA, Esq. of Murphy Austin Adams Schoenfeld LLP (tel: 916-446-2300) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: COMPLIANCE HEARING.

The Court holds a discussion regarding the high amount of cashed checks. The Court inquires as to whether anybody opposes this matter. No opposition stated on the record. Upon conclusion, the Court does not deem necessary further hearings and takes the matter off calendar.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Vacated

FINAL SETTLEMENT APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEX P. KATOFSKY, Esq of Gaines & Gaines, APLC (Tel: 818-703-8985) for Plaintiff.
Atty. AARON SILVA, Esq of Murphy Austin Adams Schoenfeld LLP ((Tel: 916-446-2300) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: FINAL SETTLEMENT APPROVAL HEARING.

Final settlement approval hearing held. Matter discussed. The Court schedules a compliance hearing to October 14, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302. Parties are to file a compliance hearing report 10 days prior to the hearing. As to the issued raised by Counsel Silva regarding vacating trial dates, that request is to be addressed to Department 206.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEX P. KATOFSKY, Esq of Gaines & Gaines, APLC (Tel: 818-703-8985) for Plaintiff.
Atty. AARON SILVA, Esq of Murphy Austin Adams Schoenfeld LLP ((Tel: 916-446-2300) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DANIEL HUNTER's Unopposed Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Matter discussed. The Court grants the Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement. The Court schedules a compliance hearing to October 14, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302. Parties are to file a compliance hearing report 10 days prior to the hearing. As to the issued raised by Counsel Silva regarding vacating trial dates, the request is to be addressed to Department 206.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported (302/RBU)

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Alex Katofsky, Esq. 818-703-8985 for Plaintiff.
Charles Hellstrom, Esq. 916-446-2300 for Defendant.

Hearing is held. No one opposes the motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DANIEL HUNTER'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Leave To File Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement and leave to file second amended complaint" is granted. Final approval hearing is set for 2/5/24 at 9:30am in dept. 302. Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
